features.name: covergroup with function sample declaration
features.description: Code should include a covergroup declaration that uses 'with function sample(<formals>)' syntax to define a sample method with formal parameters
features.snippet:
covergroup cg(int x) with function sample(int addr, bit is_read);
endgroup

features.name: covergroup sample method call with arguments
features.description: Code should include a call to a covergroup instance's sample method with multiple arguments when the sample function was declared with formal parameters
